title: Prevent Authentication Bypass in OpenSAML2
description: Ensure OpenSAML2 is configured to validate SAML response signatures to prevent authentication bypass and impersonation.
recommendation: Configure OpenSAML2 to properly validate SAML response signatures.
impact: Allows an attacker to impersonate other users, bypass authentication mechanisms, and gain unauthorized privileges, potentially compromising the entire system.

checks.message: Configure OpenSAML2 to properly validate SAML response signatures.
